message:
fix: pin asupersync to exact version and clean up EditTool size guard

- Cargo.toml: Pin asupersync from "0.2.5" to "=0.2.5" in both
  [dependencies] and [dev-dependencies] to prevent accidental
  semver-compatible upgrades that could break API compatibility.
- src/tools.rs: Replace `READ_TOOL_MAX_BYTES as u64` cast with
  direct u64 usage (READ_TOOL_MAX_BYTES is already u64), use
  usize::try_from for the comparison, and simplify the error format
  string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
